communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Documents between January 1st to December 31st of 2018 that relate with annual reports showing the number of inmates that participated and hours work under the inmate firefighting program.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Padilla

title: Reports of bear intrusions to residences and businesses in the Lake Tahoe Basin from 11/1/2025, to 2/30/2026

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Police reports and records documenting individual incidents of bears entering residences and businesses within your respective jurisdiction in the Lake Tahoe basin, from November 1, 2025, to February 30, 2026. This includes both soft entry (ie, the bear entering either through an unlocked door or window) and forced entry (ie, the bear breaks a locked door or window to enter the structure).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Madison Burrows

communications.subject: Nevada Public Records Act Request: NDOW Big Game Poaching Incidents (Aug 2025–Dec 2026)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am seeking records from the Nevada Department of Wildlife regarding reported big game poaching incidents occurring between August 2025 and December 2025. This request specifically includes all incident reports, citations, investigations, and any related documentation associated with these cases.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Madison Burrows
